items.title: pizza_son Bot
items.text: A Twitch chat bot written in Go.

items.title: Features
items.text:
• Chat commands with permission levels
  • Markov chain text generation
  • Ollama LLM integration
  • Ada learning chatbot
  • Weather lookup
  • Much more!

items.title: Commands
items.text:
Use the search bar above to find a specific command.

Usage notation

  • <argument> — required
  • [argument] — optional

  • AI

    11 commands

    AI

  • Currency

    2 commands

    Currency

  • Fun

    11 commands

    Fun

  • Games

    3 commands

    Games

  • Moderation

    6 commands

    Moderation

  • Quotes

    2 commands

    Quotes

  • Utility

    8 commands

    Utility

items.title: !ada
items.text:
Chat with Ada, the learning chatbot.

Usage: !ada <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !ada hello Hi there! !ada how are you doing? I'm doing great, what about you?

items.title: !cat
items.text:
Responds as a cat.

Usage: !cat <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !meow hello Meow meow meow! !meow should I become a cat? MEOW!

items.title: !joni
items.text:
Responds using the almighty Jon's prompt.

Usage: !joni <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !joni hello Imagine some thoughtful response here. !joni should I get a cat? Imagine some thoughtful response here.

items.title: !lark
items.text:
Reinterprets a message from !mark using an LLM.

Usage: !lark [text]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !lark the cats will have keys of backwards maps !lark should I get a cat? laugh out loud. my friend just did the unthinkable.

items.title: !llm
items.text:
Responds as a basic LLM (latest version).

Usage: !llm <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !llm hello! Hello, there, pizza_tm. !llm what's the current stream title? The current stream title is: 'Playing with kitties'

items.title: !llm1
items.text:
Responds as a basic LLM v1.

Usage: !llm1 <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !llm1 hello! Hello, there, pizza_tm. !llm1 what's the current stream title? The current stream title is: 'Playing with kitties'

items.title: !lobotomize
items.text:
Clears the LLM's memory in this channel.

Usage: !lobotomize

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !lobotomize meow

items.title: !mark
items.text:
Responds using a markov chain algorithm trained on this chat.

Usage: !mark [text]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !mark t kept calling and I can time , makes serious it ok if i can mean Kappa

items.title: !math
items.text:
Responds as a math assistant.

Usage: !math <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !math what's 9+10? The result of 9+10 is 19. !math what's pi? The value of Pi is approximately 3.14.

items.title: !nsfw
items.text:
Responds as a spicy LLM ;)

Usage: !nsfw <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !nsfw hey there Damn, that beautiful ass of yours is making me sweat. Always here for your every desire. 💦 🔥 !nsfw can you tell me a joke? Of course! Here's one for you, sweetie. Why did the cocky jock bring a ladder to bed? Because he wanted to reach that sexy ass of yours from every angle! 🍆 💦 🔥

items.title: !rnn
items.text:
Generates text using a pre-trained RNN model based off over 97k messages across few channels the bot has lurked in over a few months.

Usage: !rnn [text-to-continue]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !rnn ing the plastic. still waiting !rnn i think cats i think cats in 2025 is the best

items.title: !slicerboard
items.text:
Shows the top 5 slice holders.

Usage: !slicerboard

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !slicerboard Top slicers: #1 pizza_tm (123574 🍕) | #2 your_mom (99 🍕) | #3 pineapplesonpizza (0 🍕)

items.title: !slices
items.text:
Check your or another user's pizza slice balance, or give slices to another user. Only Moderators can set amounts.

Usage: !slices | !slices <user> | !slices give <user> <amount> | !slices set <user> <amount>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !slices You have 69 pizza slices. !slices @big_bob big_bob has 420 pizza slices. !slices give @cat_enjoyer123 500 Gave 500 pizza slices to cat_enjoyer123. !slices set @naughty_person 0 Set naughty_person slices to 0.

items.title: !8ball
items.text:
Get an accurate answer for any question you desire.

Usage: !8ball <text>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !8ball will i win today? 🎱 Only you can decide. !8ball should i sleep? 🎱 Perform a coin toss.

items.title: !eat
items.text:
Eat a slice of pizza.

Usage: !eat

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !eat ``

items.title: !emotespam
items.text:
Repeatedly send a random 7TV emote from this channel. Use !emotespam stop to stop

Usage: !emotespam <seconds> | !emotespam stop

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !emotespam 2 Spamming emotes every 2s. Use !emotespam stop to stop. !emotespam 0.5 Spamming emotes every 0.5s. Use !emotespam stop to stop. !emotespam stop Stopped emote spam.

items.title: !fact
items.text:
Responds with a random fact.

Usage: !fact

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !fact Insert random fact here.

items.title: !hug
items.text:
Hugs the target user.

Usage: !hug [user]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !hug pizza_tm hugs themselves with 23% love... what a loser smh !hug @creamyperson pizza_tm hugs creamyperson with 23% love :3

items.title: !iq
items.text:
Shows the IQ of target user.

Usage: !iq [user]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !iq pizza_tm has 100 IQ xddNerd !iq @jeff_einstein jeff_einstein has 69 IQ xddNerd

items.title: !joke
items.text:
Responds with a random joke.

Usage: !joke

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !joke Insert funny joke here.

items.title: !pee
items.text:
Pees on the target user. Note, for optimal enjoyment, you should add certain 7TV emotes.

Usage: !pee [user]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !pee pizza_tm PEE s all over themselves with 84% flavor smh !pee @water_enjoyer pizza_tm PEE s on borpaLick water_enjoyer borpaLickL with 100% flavor LICKA

items.title: !pp
items.text:
Shows the pp size of target user.

Usage: !pp [user]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !pp pizza_tm has 34cm kok SpringlesLong !pp @big_daddy69 big_daddy69 has 1cm kok SpringlesLong

items.title: !setvoice
items.text:
Set your TTS voice prefix.

Usage: !setvoice [voice]

Permission: VIP

Examples Input Output !setvoice chewbacca TTS voice set to: chewbacca !setvoice Your TTS voice is chewbacca

items.title: !speak
items.text:
Run a command with the result being spoken using TTS.

Usage: !speak <command> [args]

Permission: VIP

Examples Input Output !speak mark bestie: cats is thing !speak how are you? bestie: I'm wonderful! !speak weather London bestie: London: +10°C

items.title: !bet
items.text:
Bet on currently ongoing predictions using pizza slices.

Usage: !bet <option> <amount>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !bet 1 100 Bet 100 slices on option 1!

items.title: !mudwrestle
items.text:
Challenge another user to a mud wrestling match for pizza slices. The winner takes all.

Usage: !mudwrestle <user> <amount> | !mudwrestle accept | !mudwrestle stats [user]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !mudwrestle @sweaty_man67 100 pizza_tm has challenged @sweaty_man67 to a mud wrestling match for 100 pizza slices! Type !mudwrestle accept within 60 seconds to accept. !mudwrestle accept sweaty_man67 has won the wrestling duel against pizza_tm and takes 100 slices. !mudwrestle stats pizza_tm mudwrestle stats - Wins: 69 | Losses: 0 | Slices won: 420 | Slices lost: 0 !mudwrestle stats @creamerman creamerman mudwrestle stats - Wins: 4 | Losses: 7 | Slices won: 245 | Slices lost: 460

items.title: !prediction
items.text:
Manage predictions using pizza slices.

Usage: !prediction start <title> | <option1> | <option2> ... | !prediction end <option> | !prediction cancel | !prediction info

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !prediction start Will he win? | Yes | No Prediction started: "Will he win?" - 1. Yes | 2. No | Bet with !bet <1/2> <amount> !prediction end 1 Prediction ended! Winning option: Yes. Paying out winners... !prediction cancel Prediction cancelled. All bets refunded. !prediction info "Will he win?" - 1. Yes (3 bets, 150 slices) | 2. No (2 bets, 80 slices)

items.title: !afterstream
items.text:
Twitch-only: Sends a message to the Discord after-stream channel.

Usage: !afterstream <text>

Permission: Moderator

items.title: !broadcast
items.text:
Broadcasts a message across all connected channels.

Usage: !broadcast <text>

Permission: Bot Moderator

Examples Input Output !broadcast Hello! Hello! (In every connected channel.)

items.title: !command
items.text:
Enable or disable commands in this channel.

Usage: !command <enable|disable|list> [command]

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !command enable hug Command !hug enabled. !command disable mark Command !mark disabled. !command list Disabled commands: !mark, !nsfw, !quote

items.title: !fetch7tv
items.text:
Fetch and cache 7TV emotes for this channel.

Usage: !fetch7tv

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !fetch7tv Fetched 69 emotes for nice_streamer87

items.title: !listener
items.text:
Enable or disable listeners in this channel.

Usage: !listener <enable|disable|list> [name]

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !listener enable meow Listener enabled: meow !listener disable mark Command disabled: mark. !listener list Listeners: mark (disabled), meow

items.title: !reloadconfig
items.text:
Reloads the config file.

Usage: !reloadconfig

Permission: Bot Moderator

Examples Input Output !reloadconfig Config reloaded! meow

items.title: !quote
items.text:
Manage and retrieve quotes. Only VIP's can add new quotes.

Usage: !quote | !quote <number> | !quote add <text> | !quote list

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !quote #4: " I love cats " - added by pizza_tm on 2026-03-05 !quote 2 #2: " Dogs are alright too " - added by meowercat on 2026-03-02 !quote add this is a quote Quote #5 added! !quote list All quotes for {insert name here meow}: https://stumburs.github.io/pizza-son/quotes/

items.title: !quotes
items.text:
Get the link to all quotes for this channel.

Usage: !quotes

Permission: Everyone

items.title: !commands
items.text:
Returns site to all commands.

Usage: !commands

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !commands Use and abuse me with these commands: https://stumburs.github.io/pizza-son/commands

items.title: !perm
items.text:
Returns the lowest permission level for calling user.

Usage: !perm

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !perm Your permission level is VIP

items.title: !ping
items.text:
Responds with Pong!

Usage: !ping

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !ping Pong!

items.title: !repeat
items.text:
Repeats what you tell it to. Pretty self explanatory.

Usage: !repeat <text>

Permission: Bot Moderator

Examples Input Output !repeat meowdy meowdy

items.title: !repeatevery
items.text:
Repeatedly send a message every N seconds. Use !repeatevery stop to stop.

Usage: !repeatevery <seconds> <message> | !repeatevery stop

Permission: Moderator

Examples Input Output !repeatevery 10 meow Repeating every 10s. Use !repeatevery stop to stop. !repeatevery stop Stopped repeating.

items.title: !signup
items.text:
Sign up to have the bot added to your channel. Your channel will be manually reviewed to determine whether it meets certain criteria. Having pizza_son added to your channel might take a day or two after passing the criteria.

Usage: !signup

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !signup You have been added to the signup list, fantastic_streamer4235! Please wait for manual review.

items.title: !timer
items.text:
Start a timer that sends an optional message after it expires. Duration can be formatted using {x}s, {x}m|min, {x}/h.

Usage: !timer <duration> [message]

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !timer 5m pizza is ready Timer set for 5m. | (after 5 minutes) | pizza_tm dinkDonk pizza is ready dinkDonk !timer 2.5h Timer set for 2.5h. | (after 2.5 hours) | dinkDonk Your end is nigh (timer is up) dinkDonk

items.title: !weather
items.text:
Gets the temperature for a location.

Usage: !weather <location>

Permission: Everyone

Examples Input Output !weather London London: +16°C

items.title: Permission Levels
items.text: Level Description Everyone All viewers Subscriber Channel subscribers VIP Channel VIPs Moderator Channel moderators Bot Moderator Bot-specific moderators Streamer The broadcaster

items.title: Listeners
items.text: Listeners run on every message passively, without requiring a command prefix.

items.title: !bertcheck corrector
items.text:
Corrects people who use !bertcheck instead of bertcheck

Permission: Everyone

Detects 67s in messages and ben's

Permission: Everyone

items.title: bertcheck
items.text:
Responds with a random bert

Permission: Everyone

items.title: currency
items.text:
Awards slices to users for chatting

Permission: Everyone

items.title: dam
items.text:
responds with 'dam' whenever someone types 'damn'

Permission: Everyone

items.title: firsttimebert
items.text:
Detects first time bert'ers

Permission: Everyone

items.title: fricc
items.text:
fricc's someone back

Permission: Everyone

items.title: guesswhat
items.text:
chicken butt's someone

Permission: Everyone

items.title: log
items.text:
Logs all messages

Permission: Everyone

items.title: markov
items.text:
Feeds chat messages into Markov generator

Permission: Everyone

items.title: meow
items.text:
meow's someone back

Permission: Everyone

items.title: moew
items.text:
moew's someone back

Permission: Everyone

items.title: ollama
items.text:
Feeds chat messages to LLM context

Permission: Everyone

items.title: scam-banner
items.text:
Detects scam bots and automatically bans them.

Permission: Everyone

items.title: snipebert
items.text:
Detects snipe messages

Permission: Everyone

items.title: url
items.text:
Detects URLs in messages and ben's

Permission: Everyone
